title: Bullish Flow Backs Space and Biotech, While TTD Signals Split
summary: Fact: the strongest bounded company catalysts cluster in FLY and IBRX, with direct operational or regulatory milestones and ThetaData-confirmed bullish options flow. Inference: TTD is the main disagreement case, because bearish analyst headlines are being contradicted by persistent call-heavy flow and a separate software/AI sentiment read-through. Fact: general market options breadth is risk-on, with 174 bullish scans versus 51 bearish scans, but IGLD and COPX show negative or deteriorating options evidence. Watch items should focus on whether direct catalysts convert into follow-through rather than treating high-IV bullish flow as confirmation by itself.

general.llm_summary: Today's discovery is dominated by one repeated AI data-center infrastructure read-through: power supply, electrical equipment, builders, chips, memory, optics, and colocation could benefit from continued buildout demand. The strongest scored opportunities are still indirect and lack usable ThetaData/options confirmation, so the read is thematic rather than company-specific.

top_opportunities.why: Highest-confidence energy-supply read-through; AI data centers imply incremental electricity and firm-power demand, but the evidence is indirect.
Highest-scored chip/networking beneficiary alongside CEG; memory demand is tied to AI workload buildouts, though no options confirmation was available.
Power distribution, backup power, switchgear, and thermal-management exposure lines up directly with data-center physical infrastructure demand.

top_risks.why: AI infrastructure exposure is already heavily watched; today's signal is indirect and could add little incremental support if expectations are already priced in.
Same AI workload read-through as other chip names, but no company-specific catalyst or ThetaData confirmation was provided.
Builder/engineering upside depends on actual data-center project conversion; the signal is indirect and lower-scored with no options evidence.

caveats: General analysis is independent of held positions; portfolio read-throughs are listed separately.

outcome_tracking.policy: Judge every active pick every 5 trading days, append a new outcome snapshot, and keep the original pick_score immutable.

calibration_notes: pick_score is an immutable point-in-time prediction.
Outcome snapshots are appended every 5 trading days for as long as the pick remains active.
Future calibration should compare direction-aware return against SPY-relative return.

# Bullish Flow Backs Space and Biotech, While TTD Signals Split

Generated: 2026-07-06T14:20:06.048694+00:00
Portfolio as of: 2026-07-06T12:23:42Z

Fact: the strongest bounded company catalysts cluster in FLY and IBRX, with direct operational or regulatory milestones and ThetaData-confirmed bullish options flow. Inference: TTD is the main disagreement case, because bearish analyst headlines are being contradicted by persistent call-heavy flow and a separate software/AI sentiment read-through. Fact: general market options breadth is risk-on, with 174 bullish scans versus 51 bearish scans, but IGLD and COPX show negative or deteriorating options evidence. Watch items should focus on whether direct catalysts convert into follow-through rather than treating high-IV bullish flow as confirmation by itself.

## Daily Analysis - My Stocks
- Opportunity IBRX: pick_score=90 confidence=0.78 theta_adjusted=0.88 - The article says traders are focused on Anktiva's potential label expansion for papillary bladder cancer, with an FDA decision date set for January 6, 2027.
- Opportunity IBRX: pick_score=87 confidence=0.72 theta_adjusted=0.82 - ImmunityBio said it was 'all systems go' for the Dunkirk Anktiva manufacturing push.
- Opportunity FLY: pick_score=86 confidence=0.93 theta_adjusted=0.95 - Firefly Aerospace landed a $144M NASA CLPS contract for a 2028 Blue Ghost lunar mission.
- Opportunity FLY: pick_score=86 confidence=0.94 theta_adjusted=0.95 - Firefly Aerospace said it won a $144 million NASA CLPS contract to deliver a rapid Moon mission with its Blue Ghost lunar lander.
- Opportunity FLY: pick_score=86 confidence=0.88 theta_adjusted=0.95 - Firefly said its Alpha rocket returned to orbit successfully, and the stock moved higher overnight.
- Opportunity IBRX: pick_score=86 confidence=0.71 theta_adjusted=0.81 - The headline says investors are watching an FDA workshop on Anktiva after IBRX's exclusive Japan BCG deal.
- Opportunity FLY: pick_score=86 confidence=0.92 theta_adjusted=0.95 - NASA selected Firefly Aerospace for one of three awards to land four new Moon missions in late 2028 under its Moon Base Program.
- Opportunity FLY: pick_score=86 confidence=0.96 theta_adjusted=0.95 - Firefly Aerospace received a $144 million NASA CLPS contract to deliver a lunar mission using its Blue Ghost lander and also completed key steps with SSC Space AB for its first planned orbital launch from Sweden.
